name: plan-context-injection
goal: Make in-flight project documents reach planning surfaces: a deterministic project-doc selection engine feeding agendas (WS-1), a composing `arete plan-context` aggregator feeding week-plan (WS-2) and daily-plan (WS-3), and week→daily invocation fidelity (WS-4). WS-5 cache is DEFERRED.
globalConstraints: Run ENTIRELY in the worktree (feature/plan-context-injection). Never switch branches in the main repo.
arete-reserv (~/code/arete-reserv) is READ-ONLY. No writes, no commits, no index refresh there. The spike-compare harness must run against a `cp -r` snapshot or assert zero writes.
Commit dist/ build artifacts (users install from GitHub).
Quality gates per task: `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` MUST pass. Do NOT weaken, .skip, or delete any AC test to make a gate pass (pre-mortem R8). A blocked AC → STOP and report.

COMPOSE, DON'T DUPLICATE: project body content is obtained ONLY via `selectProjectDocs`/`assembleBriefForProject` through IntelligenceService. No markdown body parsing in the `plan-context` CLI command (pre-mortem R6).
NO LLM/embeddings in selection — lexical only (tokenize + jaccardSimilarity + getModified). The `brief-no-llm.test.ts` invariant must stay green (pre-mortem R2).
requiredReading: .pi/expertise/core/PROFILE.md — packages/core domain map (invariants, anti-patterns, key abstractions)
.pi/expertise/cli/PROFILE.md — packages/cli command architecture, CLI↔core mapping, formatters
dev/work/plans/plan-context-injection/plan.md — full plan with pinned contract, algorithm, ACs, testing strategy
packages/core/test/services/brief-project.test.ts and brief-no-llm.test.ts — the fixture pattern (mkdtempSync + FileStorageAdapter) and the invariant guard

tasks.title: selectProjectDocs service — traverse + deterministic lexical selection + budget
tasks.description: Add a NEW pure, no-LLM function `selectProjectDocs(slug, paths, deps, opts)` to packages/core/src/services/brief-assemblers.ts (MUST be this file so the brief-no-llm grep guard covers it — R2). Returns a ProjectDocSelection descriptor (NOT rendered markdown). Traverse {README.md, root *.md, outputs/*, working/*, inputs/*} via StorageAdapter.list/getModified ONLY (never fs); apply list({extensions:['.md']}) to ALL dirs including outputs/ (R12). Score each candidate: 0.55*jaccard(tokenize(topic), tokenize(title∪firstHeading∪firstNchars)) + 0.30*recency(getModified, injected referenceDate) + locationBoost(opts.locationBoost ? outputs:+0.15|root:+0.10|working:+0.05 : 0). Tie-break locationBoost→mtime→lexical relpath. Budget: expand top docs until next exceeds budgetChars, demote overflow to listed (no mid-doc truncation), set truncated. Zero-result safety: never empty expanded when ≥1 doc exists (fall back to most-recent root-or-README); surface chosen rel+score; emit low-confidence flag when top score < threshold. Surface via IntelligenceService. locationBoost/expandWorking default FALSE (R11).
acceptanceCriteria: AC1.1 expanded[] includes ≥1 doc from {README,root *.md,outputs/*} when any exists; listed[] contains every working/* and inputs/*.md with non-empty title (fixture: 1 root + 2 working).
AC1.2 project with NO outputs/ dir returns without error, selects highest-scoring root doc.
AC1.3 budgetChars=2000 + 5000-char root doc → doc in listed[], truncated===true, no expanded body cut mid-content.
AC1.4 deterministic: identical inputs + injected referenceDate → byte-identical ordering; ties break locationBoost→mtime→lexical relpath.
AC1.7 brief-no-llm.test.ts passes unchanged (no AIService/callLLM/embedding).
AC-R11 default (no-boost) call ranks outputs/ above a more-recent working/ draft.
AC-R12 a .png/.csv in outputs/ is neither expanded nor causes error.
AC-R5 short title (≤2 content tokens) with 3 docs where correct doc is NOT most recent → relevance still wins (query enriched with area slug + project/attendee tokens).
mitigations: R1: any new param on assembleBriefForProject is optional (opts?:…, default {}), append-only; do NOT change 2-arg call sites (brief-no-llm.test.ts:122, brief-project.test.ts:210, intelligence.ts:438) or edit those tests.
R2: selectProjectDocs defined IN brief-assemblers.ts (or extend the no-LLM guard path list).
R5: enrich selection query with resolved area slug + project/attendee tokens (brief resolves at :2172-2187), not bare title.
R12: list({extensions:['.md']}) on ALL traversed dirs; cap ~20 files by mtime, list rest.
tasks.tests: packages/core/test/services/project-doc-selection.test.ts (new) — mkdtempSync + FileStorageAdapter fixtures per brief-project.test.ts; permutations README-only / +root+working / outputs present-vs-absent / oversized-root / empty-working / non-.md input / short-title.

tasks.title: Scaffold project-doc extractor + routing + recurring-template fix; wire into agenda path
tasks.description: Add a `project-doc` candidate extractor + heading regex + routing case to packages/core/src/services/agenda-scaffold.ts (:155-195, 362-398). Route project-doc candidates into BOTH priorities and general cases with a consumed.projectDoc flag; fall to unrouted only when no section consumes (R3). Dedupe vs recent-meeting candidates when the selected doc is under resources/meetings/ or overlaps (R4). Wire selectProjectDocs into the meeting-brief/agenda path so a resolved project's selected doc reaches sections[].candidates[] with source:'project-doc'. Recurring-meeting template: ADDITIVE — only meetings with a prior same-titled instance in resources/meetings/ derive template from it; 2-attendee meetings WITHOUT a prior instance still get 1on1 (R10).
acceptanceCriteria: AC1.5 assembleAgendaScaffold routes the project-document section into sections[].candidates[] with source:'project-doc'; agenda whose resolved project has a selected doc yields ≥1 such candidate (assert on scaffold object).
AC1.6 chosen doc's relative path and score appear in scaffold --json output.
AC1.8 recurring meeting with prior instance → templateType !== '1on1' derived from that instance.
AC-R3 with a MINIMAL skeleton template (no general heading) the project-doc candidate is reachable (a section OR explicitly unrouted), not silently dropped.
AC-R4 when highest-scoring doc IS the last meeting instance, it is not emitted as BOTH a recent-meeting and a project-doc candidate.
AC-R10 genuine 1:1 with no prior instance still yields templateType==='1on1' and attendee-scoped Priorities seeding (:263-314).
tasks.tests: extend packages/core/test/services/agenda-scaffold.test.ts — project-doc-bearing MeetingBrief; minimal-skeleton fixture; meeting-instance dedupe fixture; 1:1 regression fixture.

tasks.title: Agenda integration test + spike-compare harness (AC1.9 stand-in)
tasks.description: Add packages/cli/test/integration/agenda-project-doc.test.ts (new): temp workspace mirroring the glance case (area-inferring meeting + project with a roadmap root doc); run the scaffold path; assert ≥1 project-doc candidate referencing the fixture doc's SPECIFIC content (not length>=0 — R8). Must NOT touch arete-reserv. Add dev/work/plans/plan-context-injection/spike-compare.sh: runs `arete agenda scaffold --meeting "Jira Roadmap Sync" --json` with cwd=a `cp -r` snapshot of ~/code/arete-reserv (READ-ONLY; no --apply, --skip-qmd, no index write), diffs against the Phase-0 hand-assembled bundle, prints which roadmap concerns surfaced. Operator runs once pre-merge.
acceptanceCriteria: AC1.9-auto integration test asserts a specific fixture project-doc candidate reaches the agenda; runs in CI; does not reference arete-reserv.
spike-compare.sh exists, runs read-only against a snapshot, emits a concern-surfaced report (manual gate, not CI).
mitigations: R8 assert specific content, never relax assertions

tasks.title: arete plan-context --week aggregator + JSON schema + week-plan + AGENTS.md norm
tasks.description: Add `arete plan-context --week --json` command that COMPOSES selectProjectDocs/assembleBriefForProject/assembleProjectWhatsNew/retrieveWiki/topic-find via IntelligenceService (NO body parsing in the command — R6). Returns {projects[], topics[], goals[], lastWeek, generatedAt}; each projects[] entry {slug, status, whatsNew, selectedDocs[], openQuestions[], source}. Reconcile openQuestions[] source FIRST (R7): a labeled expanded entry whose heading matches /open questions/i, or a pinned new descriptor field — decide and freeze before coding consumers. Multi-project: per-project selection, shared budget (R9 — assert ≥1 doc expanded, never all-listed when ≥1 fits), slug-tag candidates. Freeze + snapshot-test the --json shape (skill contract). Wire into week-plan SKILL.md gather (replace inert ls/topic-list :142-161) + priority/task-draft logic. Add the read-before-asserting norm to AGENTS.md.
acceptanceCriteria: AC2.1 --week --json returns {projects[],topics[],goals[],lastWeek,generatedAt}; each projects[] entry carries {slug,status,whatsNew,selectedDocs[],openQuestions[],source}; shape snapshot-tested.
AC2.2 fixture blocked project with ≥1 open commitment appears with status + ≥1 open item, source-tagged.
AC2.3 lastWeek = prior now/week.md content when present, null when absent (no error).
AC2.4 project unedited >14d but status active with open work still appears.
AC2.5 AGENTS.md contains the read-before-asserting norm referencing arete plan-context --project / arete project open.
AC-R9 2 projects each with a doc >½ shared budget → ≥1 doc expanded (not all-listed).
mitigations: R6 no body parsing in command (reviewer grep parseFrontmatter|match(/##|readFileSync → zero)
R7 freeze openQuestions source before consumers
tasks.tests: packages/cli/test/integration/plan-context.test.ts (new) — temp workspace; frozen JSON snapshot; filtering/presence ACs.

tasks.title: plan-context --day mode + daily-plan wiring
tasks.description: Add `--day` mode (areas-of-today scope) to plan-context, same schema as --week, projects filtered to today's areas. Fallback (R13): when areas-of-today resolves empty (e.g. sub-confidence area inference), fall back to recently-active projects (last ~7d) OR emit reason:'no-area-today' — never a silent empty bundle. Wire into daily-plan SKILL.md gather alongside the existing contextual_memory_search.
acceptanceCriteria: AC3.1 --day --json same schema as --week, projects[] filtered to today's areas (fixture 3 projects/2 areas, calendar touches 1 → only that area's projects).
AC3.2 --day with no project-bearing area today returns projects:[] (not error) + populated generatedAt.
AC-R13 a day whose meetings all infer area below confidence threshold yields recent-active projects OR explicit empty-reason, never silent empty.

tasks.title: week→daily fidelity contract + @due reconciliation (SKILL.md doc work)
tasks.description: Document the week-plan→daily-plan invocation contract in the SKILL.md files: daily-plan runs its full step sequence (per-meeting memory search, agenda offers, @due tagging) even when invoked from week-plan; passed-in context may supplement but not replace required steps. Reconcile the @due rule for multi-day deadlines: preserve real deadlines, do not overwrite with the plan date. Documentation-only (rubric doc exception).
acceptanceCriteria: AC4.1 daily-plan/SKILL.md documents that per-meeting arete search --scope memory runs for each prep-worthy meeting even with passed-in context.
AC4.2 the @due rule documents that a multi-day-deadline commitment retains its real due date after a week-plan-triggered run.
